title: Bearbao Toddler Truck Toys for 3-8 Years Old Boys, Foldable 2 Layer Carrier Truck Transport Car Toys with 6 Metal Race Car with Light & Sounds, Toddler Toy Set Gifts for Boys Girls
features: 3-in-1 Transport Truck Toy: Folding Mode - This kids racing car features a design that mimics a real off-road vehicle, with inertia tires that allow children to directly push and play with the car. Track mode - When the car track is unfolded, kids can use their cars for competitive games and enjoy the racing fun. Transportation function - this transport truck car toy can directly carry 8 small cars and store them together in the vehicle body.

Foldable And Storable Track Design: This car transport truck toy is equipped with a 49 inches long car track and 6 cool alloy racing cars. The foldable double-layer storage compartment can directly accommodate 8 small cars, making it easy to carry indoors and outdoors.

Dual Car Track Racing Fun: Children can easily open the racing car track, and when they press the launch button, the car will pop out directly from car track, suitable for single or multiple person races. This is a fun transpo car truck toy suitable for 3 4 5 6 7 8 years old boys girls.

With Realistic Sound Effects: When you push the car, this car carrier truck toy comes with racing sound effects, allowing children to immerse themselves in the fun of car toys and stimulate their imagination and creativity.

Ideal Gift for 3 4 5 6 7 8 Years Old Kids: Car Carrier truck toy set with beautiful packaging, perfect for children's birthdays, Thanksgiving, Children's Day, Christmas, Halloween, Thanksgiving, and New Year. It is also the perfect toy car gift for 3 4 5 6 7 8 boys girls toddlers.
